lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਭੋਰੁ ਭਇਆ ਸਾਚਿ ਸਮਾਨੀ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: anadin bhor bheaa saach samaanee raam |
lines.english: Night and day, it is dawn for them; they merge in the True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਹਉਮੈ ਮਾਰਿ ਪਤੀਣੇ ਤਾਰਾ ਚੜਿਆ ਲੰਮਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak haumai maar pateene taaraa charriaa lamaa |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, killing his ego, he is satisfied; the meteor has shot across the sky. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਜਾਗਿ ਰਹੇ ਚੂਕੀ ਅਭਿਮਾਨੀ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh jaag rahe chookee abhimaanee raam |
lines.english: The Gurmukhs remain awake and aware; their egotistical pride is eradicated.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਚੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਗੁਰਿ ਦੀਆ ਹਰਿ ਚਰਨੀ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਗੇ ॥
lines.translit: saach naam amrit gur deea har charanee liv laage |
lines.english: The Guru blesses them with the Ambrosial Nectar of the True Name; they are lovingly attuned to the Lord's Feet.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਚਿ ਸਮਾਨੀ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਮਨਿ ਭਾਨੀ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਾਬਤੁ ਜਾਗੇ ॥
lines.translit: saach samaanee guramukh man bhaanee guramukh saabat jaage |
lines.english: The Gurmukhs are merged in the True Lord; they are pleasing to His Mind. The Gurmukhs are intact, safe and sound, awake and awake.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਗਟੀ ਜੋਤਿ ਜੋਤਿ ਮਹਿ ਜਾਤਾ ਮਨਮੁਖਿ ਭਰਮਿ ਭੁਲਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: pragattee jot jot meh jaataa manamukh bharam bhulaanee |
lines.english: The Divine Light is revealed, and in that Light, they achieve realization; the self-willed manmukhs wander in doubt and confusion.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਭੋਰੁ ਭਇਆ ਮਨੁ ਮਾਨਿਆ ਜਾਗਤ ਰੈਣਿ ਵਿਹਾਣੀ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak bhor bheaa man maaniaa jaagat rain vihaanee |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, when the dawn breaks, their minds are satisfied; they pass their life-night awake and aware. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਉਗਣ ਵੀਸਰਿਆ ਗੁਣੀ ਘਰੁ ਕੀਆ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: aaugan veesariaa gunee ghar keea raam |
lines.english: Forgetting faults and demerits, virtue and merit enter one's home.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਵਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਸੋਈ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਕੋਈ ਮਨ ਹੀ ਤੇ ਮਨੁ ਮਾਨਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: rav rahiaa soee avar na koee man hee te man maaniaa |
lines.english: He is All-pervading; there is no other. The mind comes to believe, from the mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕੋ ਰਵਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਬੀਆ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: eko rav rahiaa avar na beea raam |
lines.english: The One Lord is permeating everywhere; there is no other at all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਜਲ ਥਲ ਤ੍ਰਿਭਵਣ ਘਟੁ ਘਟੁ ਥਾਪਿਆ ਸੋ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਜਾਨਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: jin jal thal tribhavan ghatt ghatt thaapiaa so prabh guramukh jaaniaa |
lines.english: The One who established the water, the land, the three worlds, each and every heart - that God is known by the Gurmukh.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਣ ਕਾਰਣ ਸਮਰਥ ਅਪਾਰਾ ਤ੍ਰਿਬਿਧਿ ਮੇਟਿ ਸਮਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: karan kaaran samarath apaaraa tribidh mett samaaee |
lines.english: The Infinite, All-powerful Lord is the Creator, the Cause of causes; erasing the three-phased Maya, we merge in Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਅਵਗਣ ਗੁਣਹ ਸਮਾਣੇ ਐਸੀ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਪਾਈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: naanak avagan gunah samaane aisee guramat paaee |3|
lines.english: O Nanak, then, demerits are dissolved by merits; such are the Guru's Teachings. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਵਣ ਜਾਣ ਰਹੇ ਚੂਕਾ ਭੋਲਾ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: aavan jaan rahe chookaa bholaa raam |
lines.english: My coming and going in reincarnation have ended; doubt and hesitation are gone.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਮਾਰਿ ਮਿਲੇ ਸਾਚਾ ਚੋਲਾ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: haumai maar mile saachaa cholaa raam |
lines.english: Conquering my ego, I have met the True Lord, and now I wear the robe of Truth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋਤੀ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਜੋਤਿ ਸਮਾਣੀ ਆਪੁ ਪਛਾਤਾ ਆਪੈ ॥
lines.translit: jotee andar jot samaanee aap pachhaataa aapai |
lines.english: My might merges into the Light; I realize and understand my own self.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਗੁਰਿ ਖੋਈ ਪਰਗਟੁ ਹੋਈ ਚੂਕੇ ਸੋਗ ਸੰਤਾਪੈ ॥
lines.translit: haumai gur khoee paragatt hoee chooke sog santaapai |
lines.english: The Guru has rid me of egotism; my sorrow and suffering are dispelled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੇਈਅੜੈ ਘਰਿ ਸਬਦਿ ਪਤੀਣੀ ਸਾਹੁਰੜੈ ਪਿਰ ਭਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: peeearrai ghar sabad pateenee saahurarrai pir bhaanee |
lines.english: In this world of my parents' home, I am satisfied with the Shabad; at my in-laws' home, in the world beyond, I shall be pleasing to my Husband Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਮੇਲਿ ਮਿਲਾਈ ਚੂਕੀ ਕਾਣਿ ਲੋਕਾਣੀ ॥੪॥੩॥
lines.translit: naanak satigur mel milaaee chookee kaan lokaanee |4|3|
lines.english: O Nanak, the True Guru has united me in His Union; my dependence on people has ended. ||4||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਖਾਰੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: tukhaaree mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Tukhaari, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੋਲਾਵੜੈ ਭੁਲੀ ਭੁਲਿ ਭੁਲਿ ਪਛੋਤਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: bholaavarrai bhulee bhul bhul pachhotaanee |
lines.english: Deluded by doubt, misled and confused, the soul-bride later regrets and repents.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਿਰਿ ਛੋਡੀ ਸੁਤੀ ਅਵਗਣਿ ਮੁਤੀ ਤਿਸੁ ਧਨ ਵਿਧਣ ਰਾਤੇ ॥
lines.translit: pir chhoddee sutee avagan mutee tis dhan vidhan raate |
lines.english: Leaving her Husband Lord, she sleeps, and is plundered by her faults and demerits. The night is so painful for this bride.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਿਰਿ ਛੋਡਿਅੜੀ ਸੁਤੀ ਪਿਰ ਕੀ ਸਾਰ ਨ ਜਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: pir chhoddiarree sutee pir kee saar na jaanee |
lines.english: Abandoning her Husband Lord, she sleeps, and does not appreciate His Worth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਮਿ ਕ੍ਰੋਧਿ ਅਹੰਕਾਰਿ ਵਿਗੁਤੀ ਹਉਮੈ ਲਗੀ ਤਾਤੇ ॥
lines.translit: kaam krodh ahankaar vigutee haumai lagee taate |
lines.english: Sexual desire, anger and egotism destroy her. She burns in egotism.

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਡਰਿ ਹੰਸੁ ਚਲਿਆ ਫੁਰਮਾਇਆ ਭਸਮੈ ਭਸਮ ਸਮਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: auddar hans chaliaa furamaaeaa bhasamai bhasam samaanee |
lines.english: When the soul-swan flies away, by the Command of the Lord, her dust mingles with dust.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਚੇ ਨਾਮ ਵਿਹੂਣੀ ਭੁਲਿ ਭੁਲਿ ਪਛੋਤਾਣੀ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak sache naam vihoonee bhul bhul pachhotaanee |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, without the True Name, she is confused and deluded, and so she regrets and repents. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਣਿ ਨਾਹ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਇਕ ਬੇਨੰਤੀ ਮੇਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: sun naah piaare ik benantee meree |
lines.english: Please listen, O my Beloved Husband Lord, to my one prayer.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਅਪਨੇ ਨਾਹੈ ਕੋਇ ਨ ਚਾਹੈ ਕਿਆ ਕਹੀਐ ਕਿਆ ਕੀਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: bin apane naahai koe na chaahai kiaa kaheeai kiaa keejai |
lines.english: Without my Husband Lord, no one likes me at all; what can I say or do now?

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਨਿਜ ਘਰਿ ਵਸਿਅੜਾ ਹਉ ਰੁਲਿ ਭਸਮੈ ਢੇਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: too nij ghar vasiarraa hau rul bhasamai dteree |
lines.english: You dwell in the home of the self deep within, while I roll around like a dust-ball.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਿਣੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਕੋ ਸੰਗਿ ਨ ਸਾਥੀ ਆਵੈ ਜਾਇ ਘਨੇਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: vin naavai ko sang na saathee aavai jaae ghaneree |
lines.english: Without the Name, no one has any friend or companion; millions come and go in reincarnation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਨਾਮੁ ਰਸਨ ਰਸੁ ਰਸਨਾ ਗੁਰਸਬਦੀ ਰਸੁ ਪੀਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: amrit naam rasan ras rasanaa gurasabadee ras peejai |
lines.english: The Ambrosial Naam, the Name of the Lord, is the sweetest nectar of nectars. Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, with my tongue, I drink in this nectar.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਲਾਹਾ ਲੈ ਘਰਿ ਜਾਈਐ ਸਾਚੀ ਸਚੁ ਮਤਿ ਤੇਰੀ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak laahaa lai ghar jaaeeai saachee sach mat teree |2|
lines.english: Nanak: the profit is earned and the soul returns home. True, true are Your Teachings. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਜਨ ਦੇਸਿ ਵਿਦੇਸੀਅੜੇ ਸਾਨੇਹੜੇ ਦੇਦੀ ॥
lines.translit: saajan des videseearre saaneharre dedee |
lines.english: O Friend, You have travelled so far from Your homeland; I send my message of love to You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੁੰਧ ਨੈਣ ਭਰੇਦੀ ਗੁਣ ਸਾਰੇਦੀ ਕਿਉ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਮਿਲਾ ਪਿਆਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: mundh nain bharedee gun saaredee kiau prabh milaa piaare |
lines.english: The eyes of the soul-bride are filled with tears; I dwell upon Your Glorious Virtues. How can I meet my Beloved Lord God?

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਰਿ ਸਮਾਲੇ ਤਿਨ ਸਜਣਾ ਮੁੰਧ ਨੈਣ ਭਰੇਦੀ ॥
lines.translit: saar samaale tin sajanaa mundh nain bharedee |
lines.english: I cherish and remember that Friend; the eyes of this soul-bride are filled with tears.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰਸਬਦੀ ਮਿਲੈ ਵਿਛੁੰਨੀ ਤਨੁ ਮਨੁ ਆਗੈ ਰਾਖੈ ॥
lines.translit: satigurasabadee milai vichhunee tan man aagai raakhai |
lines.english: Through the Shabad, the Word of the True Guru, the separated soul-bride meets with the Lord; I place my body and mind before You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਰਗੁ ਪੰਥੁ ਨ ਜਾਣਉ ਵਿਖੜਾ ਕਿਉ ਪਾਈਐ ਪਿਰੁ ਪਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: maarag panth na jaanau vikharraa kiau paaeeai pir paare |
lines.english: I do not know the treacherous path, the way to You. How can I find You and cross over, O my Husband Lord?

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਹਲਿ ਬੁਲਾਇੜੀਏ ਬਿਲਮੁ ਨ ਕੀਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: mehal bulaaeirree bilam na keejai |
lines.english: The Lord has called you to the Mansion of His Presence - do not delay!

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਬਿਰਖੁ ਮਹਾ ਰਸ ਫਲਿਆ ਮਿਲਿ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਮ ਰਸੁ ਚਾਖੈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: naanak amrit birakh mahaa ras faliaa mil preetam ras chaakhai |3|
lines.english: O Nanak, the ambrosial tree bears the most delicious fruits; meeting with my Beloved, I taste the sweet essence. ||3||
